_comment: Committed connection config — env-var placeholders ONLY, never real tokens (tracked file). The server connects when CLOUDWAYS_ACCESS_TOKEN is set: on devices via the shell env, in claude.ai cloud environments via the environment's env vars. When the variable is unset the server simply doesn't start — no error, no tools. Multi-account setups keep using `claude mcp add -s user cloudways-<client> ...` per references/installation.md; this file wires the single default account.
